---
title: "About"
---

```{=html}
<div style="padding: 5rem 0; background: white;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-title-wrapper">
      <span class="section-badge badge-gold">About Us</span>
      <h2>Who We Are</h2>
      <div class="gold-line"></div>
      <p style="color: #666; max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto; font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.8;">
        The WITS Old Mutual Insure Risk Lab is a pioneering research laboratory
        established through a partnership between the University of the
        Witwatersrand's School of Statistics and Actuarial Science and Old Mutual
        Insure. We are dedicated to producing impactful research tackling climate risk, infectious disease modelling, and sustainable insurance through advanced statistical and machine learning methods.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="row g-5 align-items-start">
      <!-- Left column: Mission, Vision, Values -->
      <div class="col-lg-6">
        <div class="about-value-card">
          <div class="about-value-icon"><img src="images/target.png" alt="Mission" style="width: 48px; height: 48px; object-fit: contain;"></div>
          <div>
            <div class="about-value-title">Our Mission</div>
            <div class="about-value-text">
              To solve complex risk problems facing African communities and industries 
          through rigorous quantitative research. We develop methods that work in 
          practice, not just in theory, and ensure our findings reach those who can 
          use them.
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="about-value-card">
          <div class="about-value-icon"><img src="images/vision.jpg" alt="Vision" style="width: 48px; height: 48px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 12px;"></div>
          <div>
            <div class="about-value-title">Our Vision</div>
            <div class="about-value-text">
              An African-led research environment where local expertise shapes global 
          standards in risk assessment. We aim to demonstrate that world-class 
          quantitative research can emerge from and serve the continent.
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="about-value-card">
         <div class="about-value-icon"><img src="images/values.jpg" alt="Values" style="width: 48px; height: 48px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 12px;"></div>
          <div>
            <div class="about-value-title">Our Values</div>
            <div class="about-value-text">
              <ul style="padding-left: 1.2rem; margin: 0;">
                <li><strong>Academic Rigour</strong> — Maintaining the highest standards in research methodology</li>
                <li><strong>High Quality Research</strong> — Using mostly open-source tools for transparency</li>
                <li><strong>Open Collaboration</strong> — Working across disciplines and institutions</li>
                <li><strong>Industry Impact</strong> — Translating research into practical solutions</li>
                <li><strong>Capacity Building</strong> — Training the next generation of quantitative researchers</li>
              </ul>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Right column: Academic Excellence card -->
      <div class="col-lg-6">
        <div class="about-academic-card">
          <h3>Academic Excellence at WITS</h3>
          <p style="margin-top: 1rem;">
            Our lab is situated within the School of Statistics and Actuarial
            Science at WITS, one of the foremost institutions for statistical
            education in Africa. We combine rigorous academic training with
            hands-on industry exposure.
          </p>
          <ul style="padding-left: 1.2rem; margin-top: 1rem;">
            <li>Postgraduate research supervision at Honours, Masters and PhD level</li>
            <li>Industry-linked research projects with Old Mutual Insure</li>
            <li>Workshops and training programmes in R and modern analytics</li>
            <li>Building accessible computational tools for risk assessment</li>
            <li>Conference presentations and academic publications</li>
            <li>Cross-collaboration with international research groups</li>
          </ul>
        </div>

       <!-- Partners preview -->
<div class="row g-3 mt-4">
  <div class="col-6">
    <div class="partner-card" style="padding: 1.5rem;">
      <img src="images/wits.jpg" alt="WITS" style="width: 56px; height: 56px; object-fit: contain; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
      <div class="partner-name" style="font-size: 1rem;">University of the Witwatersrand</div>
      <div class="partner-text" style="font-size: 0.8rem;">
        One of Africa's leading research-intensive universities.
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-6">
    <div class="partner-card" style="padding: 1.5rem;">
      <img src="images/oldmutual.jpg" alt="Old Mutual Insure" style="width: 56px; height: 56px; object-fit: contain; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
      <div class="partner-name" style="font-size: 1rem;">Old Mutual Insure</div>
      <div class="partner-text" style="font-size: 0.8rem;">
        A leading insurer in South Africa driving industry innovation.
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- History / Timeline Section -->
<div class="bg-light-section" style="padding: 5rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-title-wrapper">
      <span class="section-badge badge-navy">Our Journey</span>
      <h2>Lab History</h2>
      <div class="gold-line"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="row justify-content-center">
      <div class="col-lg-8">
        <div style="border-left: 3px solid var(--color-gold); padding-left: 2rem;">
          <div style="margin-bottom: 2rem;">
            <h4 style="color: var(--color-navy) !important; margin-bottom: 0.25rem;">
  <img src="images/establishment.jpg" alt="Establishment" style="width: 24px; height: 24px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 4px; vertical-align: middle; margin-right: 0.5rem;">
  Establishment
</h4>
            <p style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--color-gold-dark); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Partnership Foundation</p>
            <p style="color: #666; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.7;">
              The Risk Lab was established through a strategic partnership between
              the University of the Witwatersrand's School of Statistics and
              Actuarial Science and Old Mutual Insure, recognising the need for
              dedicated research capacity in risk analytics.
            </p>
          </div>
          <div style="margin-bottom: 2rem;">
            <h4 style="color: var(--color-navy) !important; margin-bottom: 0.25rem;">
  <img src="images/growth.jpg" alt="Team Growth" style="width: 24px; height: 24px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 4px; vertical-align: middle; margin-right: 0.5rem;">
  Team Growth
</h4>
            <p style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--color-gold-dark); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Building Research Capacity</p>
            <p style="color: #666; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.7;">
              The lab includes leading researchers, lecturers,
              postdoctoral fellows, and talented postgraduate students, each
              contributing unique expertise in statistics, actuarial science,
              and machine learning.
            </p>
          </div>
          <div>
            <h4 style="color: var(--color-navy) !important; margin-bottom: 0.25rem;">
  <img src="images/impact.jpg" alt="Current Impact" style="width: 24px; height: 24px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 4px; vertical-align: middle; margin-right: 0.5rem;">
  Current Impact
</h4>
            <p style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--color-gold-dark); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Research & Outreach</p>
            <p style="color: #666; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.7;">
              Today the lab is building its research programme, with team members 
  actively developing projects in climate risk, health statistics, and 
  spatial modelling. We are growing our network of academic and industry 
  partnerships across South Africa and beyond.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div> 
```
